title: MonthlyIndicator
description: A single OCME performance indicator with a time series of monthly values — the ONLY dataset filed under the OCME agency label on NYC Open Data ('Monthly Indicators', 8r6c-ydwk). This is a Mayor's Management Report (MMR) reporting artifact, a wide 'indicator × month' pivot whose real values run July 2015 - May 2016; it is not death-investigation data. Modeled here in a normalized (indicator + values[]) shape.

x-source.note: Shared MMR performance-indicator passthrough, not OCME-owned casework.

agencyName.description: 'Agency Name' — Office of Chief Medical Examiner.

values.description: The monthly value series (July 2015 - May 2016 in the source pivot), normalized to month/value pairs.
